displayTitle: Star Wars (2013) #01: In the Shadow of Yavin, Part One
synopsis: This is Star Wars as you remember it... and as you have never seen it before! We're taking you back to those heady, adventure-filled days following the destruction of the Death Star, when the Empire ruled, the Rebels were on the run, and the galaxy was a dangerous place where anything might happen!
title: Star Wars (2013) #01: In the Shadow of Yavin, Part One
